# Select

Lets a user choose one option from a native menu.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/select
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview
  slug="select"
  example={0}
  code={`<Select.Root>
  <Select.Trigger aria-label="Status"><Select.Value placeholder="Choose a status" /></Select.Trigger>
  <Select.Content>
    <Select.Item value="draft">Draft</Select.Item>
    <Select.Item value="published">Published</Select.Item>
    <Select.Item value="archived">Archived</Select.Item>
  </Select.Content>
</Select.Root>`}
/>

```tsx
<Select.Root>
  <Select.Trigger aria-label="Status">
    <Select.Value placeholder="Choose a status" />
  </Select.Trigger>
  <Select.Content>
    <Select.Item value="draft">Draft</Select.Item>
    <Select.Item value="published">Published</Select.Item>
    <Select.Item value="archived">Archived</Select.Item>
  </Select.Content>
</Select.Root>
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="select"
  example={1}
  code={`<Select.Root>
  <Select.Trigger invalid aria-label="Status"><Select.Value placeholder="Required" /></Select.Trigger>
  <Select.Content>
    <Select.Item value="draft">Draft</Select.Item>
  </Select.Content>
</Select.Root>`}
/>

```tsx
<Select.Root>
  <Select.Trigger invalid aria-label="Status">
    <Select.Value placeholder="Required" />
  </Select.Trigger>
  <Select.Content>
    <Select.Item value="draft">Draft</Select.Item>
  </Select.Content>
</Select.Root>
```

<ComponentPreview
  slug="select"
  example={2}
  code={`<Select.Root disabled>
  <Select.Trigger aria-label="Locked"><Select.Value placeholder="Locked" /></Select.Trigger>
  <Select.Content>
    <Select.Item value="locked">Locked</Select.Item>
  </Select.Content>
</Select.Root>`}
/>

```tsx
<Select.Root disabled>
  <Select.Trigger aria-label="Locked">
    <Select.Value placeholder="Locked" />
  </Select.Trigger>
  <Select.Content>
    <Select.Item value="locked">Locked</Select.Item>
  </Select.Content>
</Select.Root>
```

## Props

| Prop      | Type         | Required | Default | Description |
| --------- | ------------ | -------- | ------- | ----------- |
| `invalid` | `boolean`    | No       | -       | -           |
| `size`    | `SelectSize` | No       | -       | -           |

## Variants

| Variant | Values           |
| ------- | ---------------- |
| `size`  | `sm`, `md`, `lg` |

## Registry

- Manifest: `/r/select.json`
- Recipe: `select`
- Files: `src/components/ui/select.tsx`
